sanctum-gauntlets.name: Sanctum Gauntlets
sanctum-gauntlets.description: Gauntlets forged in hellfire. They grip with infernal strength.

binding-chain-ring.name: Binding Chain Ring
binding-chain-ring.description: A ring made from demon-binding chains. It constrains dark magic.

kravax-apron.name: Kravax's Forge Apron
kravax-apron.description: The forge-master's apron. Fireproof, bladeproof, and terrifyingly heavy.

hellforged-amulet.name: Hellforged Amulet
hellforged-amulet.description: An amulet forged in the sanctum. It burns faintly against the skin.

sanctum-treads.name: Sanctum Treads
sanctum-treads.description: Boots that walked through hellfire. They leave scorch marks.

vythara-crown.name: Vythara's Crown
vythara-crown.description: The oracle's crown. It whispers possible futures. Most are terrible.

oracle-codex.name: Oracle Codex
oracle-codex.description: A tome of prophecies. Every page you read changes the future.

azareth-crown.name: Azareth's Crown
azareth-crown.description: The demon prince's crown. Wearing it commands obedience from lesser demons.

infernal-throne-blade.name: Infernal Throne Blade
infernal-throne-blade.description: Azareth's sword, forged from a collapsed star and quenched in demon blood.

sanctum-signet.name: Sanctum Signet
sanctum-signet.description: The seal of the Infernal Sanctum. It radiates dark authority.

portal-shard-codex.name: Portal Shard Codex
portal-shard-codex.description: A codex containing the secrets of infernal portal magic. Reading it feels like standing in a doorway between worlds.
